into_the_wild.name: Park Somerlust
into_the_wild.description: A waterfront park in Amsterdam where you can spot local wildlife like seals swimming in the water. A peaceful natural spot perfect for observing Amsterdam's local fauna.

into_the_wild.name: Haarlemmerdijk
into_the_wild.description: A historic Amsterdam street that showcases the city's transformation from a car-centric area in the 1970s to a pedestrian and cyclist-friendly zone. A great example of urban development and cycling culture.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Haarlemmerdijk
gram_worthy_spots.description: A picturesque Amsterdam street that captures the essence of the city's cycling culture and urban design. Known for its transformation story and photogenic street scenes reflecting local life.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Park Somerlust
off_the_beaten_path.description: A local waterfront park in Amsterdam where seals have been spotted in the water, offering an unexpected wildlife experience in an urban setting. A lesser-known natural gem for observing Amsterdam's wildlife.
